# Generative UI Study

This site is a TanStack Start study app about Generative UI.

Start here:

- `/` - interactive demo showing UI surfaces inserted into chat
- `/llms-full.txt` - full agent-readable project overview

Main concepts:

- Generative UI means returning interactive UI in a conversation when text is not enough.
- MCP Apps use UI resources embedded in a host, commonly sandboxed.
- A2UI/json-render style flows use declarative component JSON rendered by the host.
- WebMCP style flows expose meaningful tools from web apps so humans and AI can cooperate.
